cases.summary: Observe current state, wait safely, and write runtime memory notes
contractEvidence: observation snapshot includes observer id, visible actors array, and memory array
wait resolves with positive ticks and bounded duration evidence
memory note is persisted in runtime memory
postconditionEvidence: bounded wait completed before memory note was persisted

readinessItems.detail: runtimeObserveAndRemember is implemented in the seed action skill registry
probe role gatherer is valid for runtimeObserveAndRemember

cases.summary: Mine nearby trees to gather logs
contractEvidence: candidate log block is selected from live block search
pathfinder movement does not drift farther from the selected log
Mineflayer dig promise resolves without interruption
log inventory count increases after dig or nearby drop pickup
postconditionEvidence: runtime verifier passed after log inventory reached the target count

readinessItems.detail: collectLogs is implemented in the seed action skill registry
probe role gatherer is valid for collectLogs

cases.summary: Craft planks and sticks from logs
contractEvidence: craft target resolves to a concrete Mineflayer item id
recipesFor returns an available inventory recipe
crafting is blocked when inventory evidence is unavailable
bot.craft is awaited before crafted inventory evidence is reported
crafted result is blocked when available inventory counts do not increase
postconditionEvidence: runtime verifier passed after plank and stick inventory outputs

readinessItems.detail: craftPlanksAndSticks is implemented in the seed action skill registry
probe role crafter is valid for craftPlanksAndSticks

cases.summary: Craft a crafting table from planks
contractEvidence: crafting_table exists in registry
inventory recipe is available without an existing crafting table
crafting is blocked when inventory evidence is unavailable
bot.craft is awaited before success is returned
crafted result is blocked when available inventory counts do not increase
postconditionEvidence: runtime verifier passed after crafting table inventory output

readinessItems.detail: craftCraftingTable is implemented in the seed action skill registry
probe role crafter is valid for craftCraftingTable

cases.summary: Inspect the shared chest to check what is available
contractEvidence: shared chest accessor returns item counts
ledger-backed storage observation is included in runtime state
inspect result carries actor id, chest id, and positive ledger sequence
postconditionEvidence: shared chest inspection returned a ledger-backed chest id and non-empty positive item snapshot

readinessItems.detail: inspectSharedChest is implemented in the seed action skill registry
probe role gatherer is valid for inspectSharedChest

cases.summary: Deposit surplus items into the shared chest
contractEvidence: role deposit rules allow the item
deposit operation moves a positive item count
storage ledger records the contribution
deposit result carries actor id, chest id, and positive ledger sequence
postconditionEvidence: deposit_shared moved a named item with ledger identity, chest id, and positive count

readinessItems.detail: depositSharedItems is implemented in the seed action skill registry
probe role gatherer is valid for depositSharedItems

cases.summary: Walk to a teammate and ask for a specific item
contractEvidence: move_to reports measured before/after distance
pathfinder timeout is bounded and stopped
say result records delivered target and text evidence
postconditionEvidence: say result confirmed targeted request text for a specific item

readinessItems.detail: approachAndRequestItem is implemented in the seed action skill registry
probe role crafter is valid for approachAndRequestItem

cases.summary: Tell teammates about a new resource location
contractEvidence: resource announcement is sent through runtime chat
say result records delivered target and resource-discovery text evidence
resource note is persisted for future provider context
postconditionEvidence: say result confirmed targeted resource-discovery text
resource note was persisted after announcement

readinessItems.detail: announceResourceDiscovery is implemented in the seed action skill registry
probe role gatherer is valid for announceResourceDiscovery

cases.summary: Deposit an item at the shared chest for a requesting teammate
contractEvidence: deposit operation moves a positive item count into shared storage
ledger links contribution to actor and task
say result records delivered target and handoff text evidence
postconditionEvidence: deposit_shared moved a positive item count with ledger identity
say result confirmed targeted handoff text

readinessItems.detail: handoffItemAtChest is implemented in the seed action skill registry
probe role gatherer is valid for handoffItemAtChest

cases.summary: Wait nearby while a crafter finishes their current task
contractEvidence: busy state is treated as a valid defer signal
busy say result records actor and target evidence
wait completes with positive ticks and bounded duration evidence
follow-up say result records delivered target and text evidence
postconditionEvidence: say result confirmed targeted busy state
say result confirmed targeted follow-up text

readinessItems.detail: waitForBusyCrafter is implemented in the seed action skill registry
probe role gatherer is valid for waitForBusyCrafter
